homepage.title: Home | Anna Turley MP
homepage.meta_description: Learn about Anna Turley, the Labour MP for Redcar and Cleveland, and her latest campaigns, news, and activities in Parliament and at home. Find out how to contact her, get involved and sign up for her Newsletter.

homepage.text_excerpt: --> Home | Anna Turley MP top of page Menu Close Home Campaigns News Newsletter Email Expenses Bring A Pier Back To Redcar Post Thank you, Redcar and Cleveland, for electing me to serve as your Labour MP once again. My speech at the count this morning: HUGE NEWS FOR REDCAR AND CLEVELAND: LanzaJet’s Selection of Redcar and Cleveland for Major Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) Production Facility New Figures show 2,425 people in Redcar and Cleveland set to gain up to £1,400 a year thanks to Budget Minimum Wage boost WE PROMISED - WE DELIVERED Protecting Jobs at Ensus Great to be at the Saltburn Food Festival. So many incredible stalls and activities,A great day for the whole family. Visit to Material Evolution in South Bank Bridget Phillipson in Saltburn Announcing New investment for SEND places show Labour is delivering change for places like Redcar and Cleveland It’s three years since Russia launched its vile assault on Ukraine. Healthcare where it belongs, in the heart of our community ❤️ Labour Stands for Children: Investing in Their Future, Protecting Their Wellbeing Say NO to the Grangetown Incinerator Saks Hair Redcar Supporting Teesside Hospice: My Charity of the Year for 2025 It was a pleasure to welcome Stephanie Peacock MP, Minister for Sport, Media and Youth, to Normanby United FC today! TEESSIDE AT THE FOREFRONT OF LABOUR GOVERNMENT INVESTMENT ONCE AGAIN Chocolini's Headland Espresso What a day! GCSE Results Day! Enough with Political Games that Ignore the Victims – It’s Time for Real Action to Protect Our Children. 🌞 Free Breakfast Clubs at Overfields and New Marske Primary! Fantastic to visit Redcar and Cleveland College today following Teesside’s biggest ever single investment by this Labour Government. It's been a busy week back down in Parliament, see what I've been up to below: Anna Turley MP secures a New Investment for Adult Social Care in Redcar & Cleveland Great to meet with some of our incredible local GPs and Practices on Wednesday! ESTON BATHS UPDATE 🚀 Supporting Investment in Redcar and Cleveland Net Zero Teesside Signed, Sealed, and Delivered: Labour Government Delivers on Historic £4 Billion Investment in Teesside Here's a quick update on my past week in Parliament: Redcar and Cleveland MP and Secretary of State Jonathan Reynolds Addresses UK Steel Parliamentary Summit: A Once-in-a-Generation Opportunity for UK Steel Good morning from me and Larry the Cat ! Visit SSE this afternoon to discuss the future of renewable energy off our coast. Wes Streeting Visits Ormesby with Local MP Anna Turley Are vet bills leaving you out of pocket? Lions Sports Bar & Grill Eston in Whale Hill Potholes are a menace, but Labour is fighting back. Labour is going to tackle an additional 7 million potholes this year. So if you see a pothole, report it. Our first 100 days in Government! Local MP Anna Turley and her team secure £50,465 for Redcar and Cleveland residents since July Small Business Saturday! Anna Turley Secures Public Health Funding Boost in Redcar & Cleveland Ending the Tory Sewage Crisis. A Level Results Day! Wes Streeting, Secretary of State for Health and Social care is coming to Redcar and Cleveland this weekend! Ormesby Surgery Britain Remade and Anna Turley Host Public Meeting where Local residents show their support for Net Zero Teesside World Leading Innovation in South Bank and Redcar and Cleveland! Zoes Place - Normanby Anna Turley urges Redcar and Cleveland schools to sign up for free breakfast club rollout You Spoke, We Acted: Real Changes to Disability Benefit Reforms I’m delighted and honoured to announce that the Prime Minister has asked me to serve as a Government Whip in the new Labour administration. ‘Inspiring’ Grangetown Netball Club Celebrated in Parliament by Local MP, Anna Turley Redcar & Cleveland MP Anna Turley welcomes Labour’s plans to bring back the family doctor No more delay - this government is delivering for Teesside. Taking Action on Leukaemia in Redcar & C

news_items.title: Bring A Pier Back To Redcar
Thank you, Redcar and Cleveland, for electing me to serve as your Labour MP once again. My speech at the count this morning:
HUGE NEWS FOR REDCAR AND CLEVELAND: LanzaJet’s Selection of Redcar and Cleveland for Major Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) Production Facility
New Figures show 2,425 people in Redcar and Cleveland set to gain up to £1,400 a year thanks to Budget Minimum Wage boost
WE PROMISED - WE DELIVERED
Protecting Jobs at Ensus
Great to be at the Saltburn Food Festival. So many incredible stalls and activities,A great day for the whole family.
Visit to Material Evolution in South Bank
Bridget Phillipson in Saltburn Announcing New investment for SEND places show Labour is delivering change for places like Redcar and Cleveland
It’s three years since Russia launched its vile assault on Ukraine.
Healthcare where it belongs, in the heart of our community ❤️
Labour Stands for Children: Investing in Their Future, Protecting Their Wellbeing
Say NO to the Grangetown Incinerator
Saks Hair Redcar
Supporting Teesside Hospice: My Charity of the Year for 2025
It was a pleasure to welcome Stephanie Peacock MP, Minister for Sport, Media and Youth, to Normanby United FC today!
TEESSIDE AT THE FOREFRONT OF LABOUR GOVERNMENT INVESTMENT ONCE AGAIN
Chocolini's
Headland Espresso
What a day!
GCSE Results Day!
Enough with Political Games that Ignore the Victims – It’s Time for Real Action to Protect Our Children.
🌞 Free Breakfast Clubs at Overfields and New Marske Primary!
Fantastic to visit Redcar and Cleveland College today following Teesside’s biggest ever single investment by this Labour Government.
It's been a busy week back down in Parliament, see what I've been up to below:
Anna Turley MP secures a New Investment for Adult Social Care in Redcar & Cleveland
Great to meet with some of our incredible local GPs and Practices on Wednesday!
ESTON BATHS UPDATE
🚀 Supporting Investment in Redcar and Cleveland
Net Zero Teesside Signed, Sealed, and Delivered: Labour Government Delivers on Historic £4 Billion Investment in Teesside
Here's a quick update on my past week in Parliament:
Redcar and Cleveland MP and Secretary of State Jonathan Reynolds Addresses UK Steel Parliamentary Summit: A Once-in-a-Generation Opportunity for UK Steel
Good morning from me and Larry the Cat !
Visit SSE this afternoon to discuss the future of renewable energy off our coast.
Wes Streeting Visits Ormesby with Local MP Anna Turley
Are vet bills leaving you out of pocket?
Lions Sports Bar & Grill Eston in Whale Hill
Potholes are a menace, but Labour is fighting back. Labour is going to tackle an additional 7 million potholes this year. So if you see a pothole, report it.
Our first 100 days in Government!
Local MP Anna Turley and her team secure £50,465 for Redcar and Cleveland residents since July

pages.title: Protecting Jobs at Ensus
pages.meta_description:
When the UK–US trade deal was signed, it was a big step for the country. This deal has bought huge opportunities – making it easier for our businesses to trade, grow, and compete on the world stage.



But I’ve always said that we’ve got to be honest about the full picture. And the agreement on bioethanol bought a real challenge for UK producers, including our own here on Teesside - Ensus – the bioethanol plant on Wilton site.



Ensus
